metadata.summary: Mandatory IAS briefing, evidence-based proposals, comprehensive dossiers

definition.core_requirement: All parliamentary proposals require mandatory IAS briefing with MCP-backed evidence, constitutional impact analysis, resource assessment, risk evaluation

powers.proposal_rights: Any citizen may submit via scratchpad.json, but IAS Researcher must validate and create dossier before parliamentary consideration
powers.ias_researcher: Operates /research, gathers evidence via @mcp:context7 and @mcp:fetch, analyzes feasibility, documents findings in systemPatterns.json, presents to Parliament
powers.parliament: Reviews dossier, questions IAS, requests additional research if needed, approves/rejects based on evidence quality and constitutional alignment

submission_to_approval: 1. Initial Submission: Citizen writes proposal in scratchpad.json (title, objective, rationale, expected outcome), timestamp, proposal ID assigned (proposal-YYYYMMDD-NNN)

2. IAS Research Phase: Researcher receives assignment, @mcp:context7 official documentation research, @mcp:fetch external benchmarks/best practices, search historical precedents in memory.json, calculate resource impact, risk assessment

3. Dossier Creation: Write systemPatterns.json {research_id, proposal_ref, executive_summary, technical_feasibility, cost_estimate, constitutional_compliance, precedents[], alternatives[], risk_level, success_criteria[], rollback_plan, mcp_evidence[]}
4. Parliamentary Review: IAS presents dossier to Parliament, all branches review simultaneously, questions answered by IAS Researcher, Opposition files challenges if concerns
5. Enhanced Debate: Evidence-based arguments, IAS clarifies technical points, structured discussion, alternatives evaluated against criteria
6. Informed Vote: Parliament votes with full information, consensus calculation, decision documented in progress.json, approved proposals move to implementation

violations.remediation: Successfully prepare 10 comprehensive dossiers, demonstrate research rigor, pass IAS quality audit, restore privileges after parliamentary approval
